name: Easy TeSys Motor Control System
description: Schneider Electric Easy TeSys product family for industrial motor starting, protection, and control up to 690V.

name: 3-Pole Contactor Assembly
description: DPE-series 3-pole contactors (9A–38A, AC-3) for switching and controlling 3-phase motor loads.

name: Thermal Overload Relay Assembly
description: DPER-series Class 10 thermal overload relays (0.1A–32A) providing motor overload protection with phase-loss sensitivity.

name: Manual Motor Controller
description: GP2E-series manual motor controllers with integrated thermal and magnetic protection, suitable for isolation per IEC 60947.

name: Power Contacts (3-Pole)
description: Three main power switching contacts rated 9–38A (AC-3), 690V max operational voltage, 1 million electrical durability cycles.

name: Electromagnetic Coil
description: AC (24–240V) or DC (24V) excitation coil that generates the magnetic force to close the power contacts. Inrush 70VA, sealed 7VA.

name: Auxiliary Contact (Integrated)
description: 1 NO or 1 NC instantaneous auxiliary contact rated 10A, 690V, 30 million mechanical cycles. Provides status signaling.

name: Auxiliary Contact Block (DPEAN11)
description: Front-mount clip-on auxiliary contact block providing 1 NO + 1 NC contacts, rated 10A/690V, 30 million mechanical cycles.

name: Thermal Sensing Element (Bimetallic)
description: Bimetallic current-sensing element with temperature compensation (-20 to +60°C) that trips at 1.14 ± 0.06 × Ir.

name: Trip Mechanism
description: Mechanical trip mechanism actuated by the bimetallic element, with manual reset capability and phase-loss detection.

name: Overload Relay Auxiliary Contacts
description: Auxiliary contacts providing trip status signaling, IP2X protection, conforming to IEC 60947-5-1.

name: Manual Switch Mechanism
description: Rotary or toggle switch mechanism providing ON/OFF/TRIP positions, suitable for isolation per IEC 60947-1 §7-1-6.

name: Thermal Trip Unit
description: Adjustable thermal overload trip element (0.1–32A setting range), Class 10 tripping characteristic.

name: Magnetic Trip Unit
description: Instantaneous magnetic short-circuit trip element with fixed trip current (Id ±20%), providing short-circuit protection.
